title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on resolving critical platform stability issues that were causing workflow interruptions for RevOps teams. Key fixes prevent form field configuration errors in Salesforce and eliminate false error messages that were blocking user sessions from starting properly.

entries.headline: Fixed Salesforce form field and record type configuration errors
details: Prevents hidden field addition errors when Dynamic Forms are enabled
Automatically assigns record types to System Administrator profiles to prevent configuration conflicts
Converts blocking routing errors into advisory warnings to keep workflows running

entries.headline: Fixed false error messages blocking session startup
